title: Simplifying Logic Circuits with Don't-Care Conditions
description: A visual representation of how don't-care conditions (represented by 'X') expand the possible groupings in a Karnaugh Map, leading to a simpler, more optimized Boolean expression.
relationships: Truth table outputs marked as 'don't-care' are mapped as 'X' on the K-map
The 'X' cells can be optionally included in groupings to make them larger
Larger groupings in the K-map yield a more simplified output equation
